scope: DM1/V1 inventory toggle input route, command dispatch guards, open/close side effects, and Firestaff route isolation from HUD chrome

sourceRanges.assertion: Movement-mode right-click on C002_ZONE_SCREEN dispatches C083_COMMAND_TOGGLE_INVENTORY_LEADER.
Inventory-mode right-click on C002_ZONE_SCREEN and close icon C566 both dispatch C011_COMMAND_CLOSE_INVENTORY.
DM1 PC/I34E interface keyboard table maps F1-F4 scan codes to C007..C010 inventory toggles.
C007..C011 toggle/close commands are candidate-champion-gated before F0355_INVENTORY_Toggle_CPSE.
C083 leader right-click toggles the current leader inventory only when a leader exists.
Inventory toggle rejects invalid/dead targets and eye/mouth presses, sets inventory panel content, and converts a same-champion open request into close.
Closing an already-open inventory clears G0423 inventory ordinal, restores movement inputs/arrows, redraws dungeon floor/ceiling, and returns.
Opening sets the inventory champion ordinal, hatches movement arrows on first open, expands C017_GRAPHIC_INVENTORY, draws slots, and marks viewport/status/panel/icons dirty.
Firestaff inventory-toggle input clears the map overlay, calls the inventory panel toggle, and requests redraw without touching debug HUD state.
Firestaff toggle flips inventoryPanelActive and resets selected slot only when the panel opens.

nonClaims: Does not validate V2 inventory art quality, HUD styling, or debug HUD behavior.
Does not prove all runtime click delivery semantics; this is a source/evidence gate for the toggle route and side effects.
Does not use deprecated remote source; source paths are ReDMCSB and Firestaff N2 only.
